assertion: A false or unverified claim is delivered as actor-local belief/claim with provenance, not as world truth.
Observation records preserve source event ids, authority trace ids, and subject refs before entering an actor frame.
Reflection set_belief updates legacy NPC beliefs and also writes a provenance-rich actor knowledge row.
Knowledge whose base/valid/observed world version is after a restored snapshot is invalidated and filtered from retrieval.
Source-backed reports can be retrieved by structured refs/query and passed into ActorFrame under reports without full history dumping.
